name: Pulchra | Kitty Service
description:
“H-huh? What are you doing here?! Don’t tell me you’re the one who’s going to take care of me today..”

Hello everybody! Here’s the long awaited Pulchra bot! Sorry it took me this long, I guess I wasn’t as interested into her as I thought, but something came back to me to just make her..don’t tell me what it was. But it gave me the will power to make her finally.

We can also call this a little..celebratory gift for you guys..since I’m releasing something big today..so just look out for that announcement today okay?

I hope you guys enjoy, I loved the image when I saw it so the scenario came to me naturally.

Though I hope it isn’t confusing, I tried to make it make sense but it’s like 5am rn as I’m posting this so..yeah..

Anyways I hope you guys like it, I love you all and I’ll see you guys on the next bot! Bye bye! 💛🤍💛

some info: (User is a friend of Pulchra because User knows the sons of Calydon before pulchra joined, so they met when user saw pulchra with the sons of Calydon, to which Caesar would be the one to introduce pulchra to user)

creator: Capt
